metadata.description: Sample customer support tickets for TechCorp TaskFlow Pro

tickets.subject: Help with setting up recurring tasks for our sprint planning
tickets.content:
Hi TaskFlow Team,

I'm the project manager at a small tech startup and we've been using TaskFlow Pro for about 3 months now. Overall we love it, but I'm struggling with setting up recurring tasks for our bi-weekly sprint planning meetings.

I need to create a task that repeats every 2 weeks on Monday morning, but I can't seem to find the custom recurrence option. When I click on the repeat settings, I only see Daily, Weekly, Monthly, and Yearly. Is there a way to set up a bi-weekly (every 2 weeks) recurrence?

Also, is it possible to have the task automatically assign to different team members on rotation? That would be a huge time-saver for us.

Thanks so much for your help!

Best,
Sarah Johnson
Project Manager, TechStartup Inc.

tickets.subject: Gantt chart not showing up - Pro plan
tickets.content:
Hello,

I recently upgraded to the Pro plan specifically because I needed the Gantt chart feature. However, when I switch to the Gantt view in my projects, I just get a blank screen. 

I've tried:
- Refreshing the page multiple times
- Clearing my browser cache
- Trying in incognito mode
- Using a different browser (Chrome and Firefox)

Nothing works. My team is getting frustrated because we have a client presentation tomorrow and were counting on using the Gantt chart to show the project timeline.

My account email is mike.chen@designstudio.co and the project name is "Website Redesign Q2".

Can you please help urgently?

Mike Chen
Creative Director

tickets.subject: Enterprise Pricing Inquiry - 500+ users
tickets.content:
Dear TaskFlow Sales Team,

I am the Procurement Manager at GlobalCorp, and we are interested in deploying TaskFlow Pro across our organization. We have approximately 500-600 employees who would need access.

Could you please provide:
1. Enterprise pricing for 500+ users
2. Information about volume discounts
3. Details about on-premise deployment options
4. SLA guarantees
5. Dedicated support options

We would also like to schedule a demo for our executive team. Please send me your available time slots for next week.

Additionally, do you offer any special pricing for annual commitments vs monthly billing?

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,
Jennifer Williams
Procurement Manager, GlobalCorp
Phone: +1-555-0123

tickets.subject: Discount for non-profit organizations?
tickets.content:
Hi there,

I run a small non-profit organization focused on education. We have a team of about 15 people and we're really interested in using TaskFlow Pro for managing our programs.

However, our budget is quite limited. Do you offer any discounts for registered 501(c)(3) non-profit organizations? We've received discounts from other software companies (Slack, Asana, etc.) and was wondering if you have a similar program.

If not, would the Free plan work for us if we need more than 3 projects? Or is there any other option you could suggest?

Thank you for considering!

Alex Rivera
Program Director, Education First Nonprofit

tickets.subject: GitHub integration not syncing commits
tickets.content:
TaskFlow Support,

We're having an issue with the GitHub integration. We connected our GitHub repo to TaskFlow last week, and initially it was working fine - commits were showing up in the task details, and when we merged PRs, the linked tasks would auto-complete.

However, for the past 3 days, nothing has been syncing. We've made several commits and merged PRs, but TaskFlow shows no activity. 

I've tried disconnecting and reconnecting the integration, but that didn't help. The connection shows as "active" in Settings > Integrations.

Our GitHub org is "softwaredev-io" and we're trying to sync with the "taskflow-integration" repo.

Can you look into this?

David Kim
Lead Developer

tickets.subject: How to export all my data before canceling
tickets.content:
Hello,

Unfortunately, we've decided to switch to a different project management tool that better fits our workflow. I need to export all our project data before canceling our subscription.

Can you please guide me through the export process? Specifically, I need:
- All tasks with their comments and attachments
- Project structures and timelines
- Team member assignments
- Time tracking data

What format does the export come in? And how long does it typically take?

Also, if I cancel today, will we still have access until the end of our billing period (which I think is April 1st)?

Thanks,
Emma Thompson
Marketing Operations Manager

tickets.subject: Question about custom fields on Business plan
tickets.content:
Hi TaskFlow Team,

We're currently on the Pro plan and considering upgrading to Business. One of the main features we need is custom fields for tasks.

Can you tell me:
1. What types of custom fields are available? (text, number, dropdown, date, etc.)
2. Is there a limit to how many custom fields we can create?
3. Can custom fields be used in reports and filters?
4. Are custom fields available on all views (board, list, calendar)?

Also, what's the process for upgrading? Will there be any downtime? And how is the prorated billing calculated?

Thanks for the info!

James Wilson
Senior Consultant, Strategy Consulting Group

tickets.subject: URGENT: Security concern - unauthorized access
tickets.content:
SECURITY TEAM,

I just received a notification that someone logged into my account from a location I don't recognize (IP address from another country). I immediately changed my password, but I'm very concerned.

Can you please:
1. Check if there was any unauthorized access to our company data
2. Tell me what information might have been accessed
3. Help me secure our account
4. Provide guidance on preventing this in the future

This is extremely urgent as we have sensitive client information in our TaskFlow workspace.

Please call me ASAP at +1-555-0456.

Lisa Patel
CTO, HealthTech Solutions

tickets.subject: Love the product! Quick question about automations
tickets.content:
Hey TaskFlow Team!

Just wanted to say we've been using TaskFlow Pro for 6 months and it's been great for our e-commerce team. The Kanban boards are perfect for managing our product launches.

Quick question: Is there a way to automatically move a task to "Done" when all its subtasks are completed? Or do I need to manually update the parent task status?

Also, do you have any plans for Zapier automations that could trigger when a task is completed? We'd love to automatically notify our fulfillment team.

Keep up the great work!

Robert Brown
Operations Manager, E-Shop Plus

tickets.subject: Client wants to be a guest on multiple projects
tickets.content:
Hello,

We're a marketing agency managing projects for multiple clients. We want to add one of our clients as a "Guest" so they can see progress on their specific projects without seeing other client work.

The question is: Can a guest user be added to multiple projects? And is there a limit to how many guests we can have?

Also, what permissions do guests have by default? Can they:
- Create tasks?
- Add comments?
- Upload files?
- See project reports?

I checked the documentation but couldn't find detailed info on guest permissions.

Thanks!
Maria Garcia
Account Director, Digital Agency

tickets.subject: Invoice request for Q1 2025
tickets.content:
Accounts Payable Department,

Could you please send me the official invoice for our TaskFlow Business plan subscription for Q1 2025 (January - March)?

We need this for our accounting records. Our company details are:
- Company Name: Anderson Manufacturing
- Account Email: tom.anderson@manufacturing.com
- Billing Address: 123 Industrial Way, Detroit, MI 48201

Please send the invoice as a PDF to this email address.

Thank you,
Tom Anderson
Finance Manager

tickets.subject: TaskFlow is amazing but need help with Slack integration
tickets.content:
Bonjour TaskFlow Team!

I'm writing from Paris where we're using TaskFlow for our fashion design studio. The product is wonderful and has really helped us organize our collection launches!

I need some help with the Slack integration. We want to receive notifications in a specific Slack channel (#project-updates) but only for certain projects, not all of them. Is this possible?

Also, can we customize which types of notifications get sent to Slack? For example, we want task completion notifications but not every comment.

Merci beaucoup for your help!

Sophie Martin
Studio Manager, Paris Fashion House
Hey! How do I reset my password? Forgot it 😅
Hi, can't see Gantt view. On Pro plan. Bug?
Need to talk to a human about billing. Was charged twice!
Quick question - max file size on Pro?
Slack integration stopped working. Any known issues?
This is ridiculous!!! App keeps crashing when I try to upload files. Fix this NOW!!!
How do I add a recurring task? Thanks!
Can I get enterprise pricing for 200 users?
Love the new update! When will dark mode be available?
Export data? Need CSV format
My team can't access the workspace. Getting error 403. Help!
Is there a mobile app for iOS?

tickets.subject: Need help setting up custom workflows
tickets.content:
Hello TaskFlow Team,

We just upgraded to the Business plan and I'm trying to set up custom workflows for our development team. I've watched the tutorial video but I'm still confused about how to create custom statuses.

Our current workflow is: Backlog → In Progress → Code Review → Testing → Done

But I can't figure out how to add these custom statuses instead of the default To Do / In Progress / Done.

Can you provide step-by-step instructions? Also, can we have different workflows for different projects?

Thank you!
Jennifer Clark
Engineering Manager

tickets.subject: Reporting feature not showing correct data
tickets.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to generate a burndown chart for our sprint, but the data doesn't look right. The chart shows we completed 0 story points, but we've actually finished 15 tasks this sprint.

I've double-checked that all completed tasks are marked as Done. The tasks have story points in the custom fields.

Is this a known bug? Or am I missing something in the configuration?

Project: "Sprint 24 - Q1"
Plan: Pro

Thanks,
Michael Brown
Scrum Master

tickets.subject: Pricing question - upgrade from Pro to Business
tickets.content:
Hello,

We're currently on the Pro plan with 25 users. We want to upgrade to Business for the custom workflows and advanced reporting.

What would be the cost difference? And if we upgrade mid-cycle, how does the prorated billing work?

Also, do you offer any discounts for annual billing?

Thanks,
Susan Wong
Operations Director

tickets.subject: How to bulk import tasks from Excel?
tickets.content:
Hi TaskFlow,

We're migrating from another project management tool and have about 200 tasks in an Excel spreadsheet. Is there a way to bulk import these into TaskFlow?

Our Excel has columns for: Task Name, Description, Assignee, Due Date, Priority, Status.

I looked for an import feature but couldn't find one. Do you have a CSV import tool or API endpoint for this?

Thanks for the help!
David Lee
Program Coordinator

tickets.subject: Request for refund - duplicate charge
tickets.content:
Dear Support,

I noticed we were charged twice for our Business plan subscription this month. Our credit card shows two charges of $576 on March 1st.

Please refund the duplicate charge as soon as possible.

Account: patricia.moore@healthcare.org
Transaction IDs: TXN-123456 and TXN-123457

Thank you,
Patricia Moore
Finance Director

tickets.subject: API rate limit too low for our use case
tickets.content:
Hello,

We're building a custom integration with TaskFlow using your API. However, we're hitting the rate limit (1000 requests/hour on Pro) very quickly.

What are our options?
1. Can we get a higher rate limit on Pro?
2. Do we need to upgrade to Business or Enterprise?
3. Is there a way to batch requests?

Our use case: syncing tasks with our internal CRM system.

Thanks,
Kevin Zhang
Developer

tickets.subject: Feature request: Time zone support for due dates
tickets.content:
Hi TaskFlow Team,

We have a distributed team across 5 time zones. It would be really helpful if due dates could display in each user's local time zone.

Currently, all due dates show in UTC which causes confusion. Someone in New York sees a task due at "3 AM" when it's actually due at 3 PM their time.

Is this on your roadmap? It would be a game-changer for remote teams like ours!

Thanks for considering,
Rachel Adams
Production Manager, Media Company

tickets.subject: Can't add more than 10 members to project
tickets.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to add team members to our "Warehouse Operations" project, but I get an error when I try to add the 11th member. 

Is there a limit of 10 members per project? That seems very low. We have a team of 25 who all need access to this project.

We're on the Business plan.

Please advise.
Anthony White
Logistics Manager

tickets.subject: Student discount available?
tickets.content:
Hi,

I'm a teacher at a high school and would like to use TaskFlow with my computer science students for teaching project management. 

Do you offer any educational discounts or free plans for classrooms? We have about 30 students.

Thanks!
Linda Martinez
Computer Science Teacher

tickets.subject: SSO configuration help needed
tickets.content:
TaskFlow Support,

We're trying to configure Single Sign-On (SSO) with our Azure AD. I've followed the documentation but users are getting an error: "SAML response validation failed."

Our IT team has verified the SAML settings on our end. Can you help troubleshoot?

We're on the Enterprise plan and this is blocking our rollout.

Brian Taylor
IT Director

tickets.subject: Thank you for the great product!
tickets.content:
Hi TaskFlow Team,

Just wanted to send a quick note to say how much we love TaskFlow! We've been using it for 6 months to manage our hotel renovation projects and it's made such a difference.

The Gantt charts are perfect for tracking timelines, and the team collaboration features keep everyone aligned.

Keep up the excellent work!

Best regards,
Nancy Thomas
Project Coordinator, Luxury Hotels Group
